properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We love to call your name It's something, we cannot explain That happens, when we proclaim Your great name, your great name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: King Jesus, no other name King Jesus, none stronger We can call on you Thing changes When we call on your name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's power in the name of Jesus Power in your name There's power in the name of Jesus Power in your name There's power in the name of Jesus (So much power) power in your name There's power in the name of Jesus (So much power) power in your name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Things change when we call you Jesus (Things change when) Things change when we call you name (Something happens when we call you) Things change when we call you Jesus Things when we call your name

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm free when I call you Jesus I'm free when I call your name (I feel a shifting when I call) I'm free when I call you Jesus (I feel much better when I call you God) I'm free when I call your name

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When I call your name (When I call your name) When I call your name Demons trembles at that name When I call your name I feel much stronger when I call you When I call your name I'm healed when I'm healed when When I call your name I'm set free I'm set free

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: When I call your name I'm alive when I call you When I call your name Yes God, yes God When I call your name I feel much better when I call When I call your name I feel much stronger when I call When I call your name I feel like blessing when I call When I call your name I feel my victory when I call When I call your name (come on, go)

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Something happens when we call the name out I feel a shifting when I call When I call your name I feel a breaking when I call When I call your name

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I feel a shifting when I call When I call your name I feel a breaking when I call you When I call your name
